blueprint.title: SaaS WA API — Security & Production Readiness Blueprint
blueprint.author: Code Review Agent
blueprint.summary: 13 issues identified across 3 priority levels. This blueprint provides the most proper solution for each issue with exact file locations, current problematic code, and production-grade replacement code.

issues.title: JWT Secret Hardcoded di Config Fallback
issues.impact: Siapa pun yang baca source code bisa forge JWT token dan bypass authentication sepenuhnya

solution.approach: Throw error on startup if JWT secrets are not set in production. Generate random fallback only for development mode.
additional_steps: Add startup validation function that checks all critical env vars
Log warning in development mode when using generated secrets
Add JWT_SECRET and JWT_REFRESH_SECRET to .env.example with instructions to generate

issues.risk: LOW — no functional change if env vars are already set

issues.title: Conversations Endpoint Load SEMUA Messages ke Memory (OOM Risk)
issues.impact: Server crash (Out of Memory) ketika tenant punya 100K+ messages. Single-process architecture = semua tenant ikut down.

solution.approach: Replace in-memory grouping with SQL GROUP BY query using Prisma raw query or groupBy. This pushes the aggregation to the database engine where it belongs.
additional_steps: Add database index on (organization_id, chat_jid, instance_id, created_at) if not exists
Consider materializing conversations as a separate table/view for further optimization
Add query timeout to prevent long-running queries from blocking connection pool

issues.risk: MEDIUM — requires careful testing of query output format

issues.title: Math.random() untuk Security Token (Predictable Tokens)
issues.impact: Token reset password dan invitation bisa diprediksi oleh attacker. Math.random() menggunakan PRNG yang bisa di-reverse-engineer.

solution.approach: Replace Math.random() with Node.js crypto.randomBytes() which uses the OS CSPRNG (Cryptographically Secure Pseudo-Random Number Generator).
additional_steps: Audit all other usages of Math.random() in the codebase
Replace any crypto-sensitive randomness with the fixed function
Consider using generateSecureToken() for URL tokens (password reset, invitation links)

issues.risk: LOW — drop-in replacement, same function signature

issues.title: Rate Limiting FAKE — Header Dekorasi, Tidak Pernah Enforce
issues.impact: API bisa di-abuse tanpa batas. Satu API key bisa kirim jutaan request/menit. Tidak ada proteksi DDoS per-tenant.

solution.approach: Implement Redis-backed sliding window rate limiter per API key. Use Redis MULTI/EXEC with INCR + EXPIRE for atomic counter operations. Create as Fastify preHandler hook.
additional_steps: Remove the fake addRateLimitHeaders function
Remove all addRateLimitHeaders() calls from route handlers
Add rate limit info to API documentation
Consider different limits per plan tier (free: 100/min, pro: 1000/min, enterprise: 10000/min)

issues.risk: LOW — new middleware, no breaking changes to API response format

issues.title: SSRF via Media URL — Internal Network Exposure
issues.impact: Attacker bisa scan internal network, akses AWS/GCP metadata endpoint (169.254.169.254), atau probe internal services.

solution.approach: Create a URL validator that blocks private/reserved IP ranges, internal hostnames, and non-HTTP(S) schemes. Resolve DNS first to prevent DNS rebinding attacks.
additional_steps: Add SSRF protection logging for security audit trail
Consider allowing an admin-configured allowlist for internal URLs if needed
Add timeout for DNS resolution to prevent hanging

issues.risk: LOW — adds validation before existing logic

issues.title: Auto-Reply dari Webhook Response Tanpa Opt-In
issues.impact: Webhook endpoint jahat bisa kirim spam melalui WhatsApp number kamu, trigger anti-ban, atau kirim konten abusif atas nama user.

solution.approach: Make auto-reply opt-in per instance via a database flag. Add canSendMessage() check before sending. Add rate limiting specifically for auto-replies.
additional_steps: Create Prisma migration for new fields
Add auto_reply_enabled toggle in frontend dashboard
Log all auto-replies with source='auto_reply' metadata for audit
Add webhook response size limit (max 1KB) to prevent abuse

issues.risk: MEDIUM — requires schema migration + behavior change (auto-reply will stop working until explicitly enabled)

issues.title: Subscription Status Tidak Dicek di API Key Validation
issues.impact: Organization dengan subscription expired/canceled masih bisa akses API penuh. Revenue loss dan potential abuse.

solution.approach: Add subscription status validation after the is_active check. Allow a grace period for recently expired subscriptions.
additional_steps: Ensure subscription_end_date is included in the Prisma select for validateApiKey
Add subscription status to API key validation response for debugging
Create webhook event for subscription status changes
Add X-Subscription-Status header to API responses for client awareness

issues.risk: LOW — additive check, won't affect active subscriptions

issues.title: Static Files /uploads/ Tanpa Authentication
issues.impact: File upload bisa diakses siapa saja yang tahu atau menebak URL. Termasuk media dari private conversations.

solution.approach: Replace static file serving with an authenticated endpoint that validates API key or JWT, checks organization ownership, and serves the file. Use signed URLs for time-limited access.
additional_steps: Update all existing file URL references in the codebase
Add path traversal protection (sanitize ../ from filenames)
Consider moving to cloud storage (S3/GCS) with pre-signed URLs for production
Add Content-Disposition header to force download for non-image files

issues.risk: MEDIUM — existing file URLs will break, need migration plan

issues.title: Daily Reset Worker Bikin PrismaClient Sendiri (Connection Leak)
issues.impact: Extra database connection pool (10 connections) wasted. Bypasses shared Prisma singleton and any middleware/hooks.

solution.approach: Import the shared Prisma singleton from config/database.ts instead of creating a new instance.
additional_steps: Verify if daily-reset.worker.ts runs in the same process as the main app
If same process: use shared singleton
If separate process: keep own PrismaClient but add $disconnect on shutdown
Add connection pool monitoring

issues.title: max_attempts Mismatch: Database Default=3, BullMQ Hardcoded=5
issues.impact: Webhook ditandai FAILED setelah attempt 3 (dari DB max_attempts=3), tapi BullMQ masih retry sampai attempt 5. Menghasilkan 'ghost deliveries' — pesan terkirim tapi statusnya FAILED.

solution.approach: Unify the max_attempts value. Use a single source of truth constant. Update schema default to match BullMQ config.
additional_steps: Create and run Prisma migration to change default from 3 to 5
Update existing webhook records from max_attempts=3 to max_attempts=5
Ensure webhook status update logic uses the constant, not the DB value

issues.risk: LOW — synchronization fix, no behavior change for new webhooks

issues.title: setInterval untuk Daily Reset — Timer Drift
issues.impact: Setelah berminggu-minggu, reset bisa bergeser menit-menit dari midnight. Tidak resilient terhadap restart. Tidak deduplicate jika multiple instances berjalan.

solution.approach: Replace setTimeout/setInterval with BullMQ repeatable job (already have Redis + BullMQ). This is restart-resilient, drift-free, and automatically deduplicated across multiple worker instances.
additional_steps: Update workers/index.ts to call startDailyResetWorker() and stopDailyResetWorker()
Remove old setTimeout/setInterval logic
Add BullMQ dashboard (bull-board) for monitoring repeatable jobs

issues.risk: LOW — replaces timer with proven BullMQ pattern already used in the project

issues.title: sendLocationMessage Skip Daily Limit Check (Anti-Ban Bypass)
issues.impact: Attacker bisa bypass daily message limit dengan mengirim location messages. Bisa trigger WhatsApp anti-spam dan ban nomor.

solution.approach: Add canSendMessage() check and daily_message_count increment, matching sendTextMessage and sendMediaMessage patterns exactly.
additional_steps: Audit ALL send* functions for consistent canSendMessage() usage
Consider creating a wrapper function sendWithLimitCheck() to DRY this pattern
Add unit test to verify all send functions check daily limits

issues.risk: LOW — adds missing check, same pattern as other send functions

issues.title: Tidak Ada Validasi page/limit Query Parameters
issues.impact: limit=999999 bisa dump seluruh tabel. page=0 atau page=-1 menyebabkan negative skip. limit=abc menyebabkan NaN.

solution.approach: Create a reusable pagination parser utility with min/max bounds and NaN protection.
additional_steps: Replace pagination parsing in ALL endpoints (messages, conversations, contacts, webhooks)
Add maxLimit to API documentation
Return 400 error instead of silently clamping (optional, stricter approach)

issues.risk: LOW — backwards compatible, only adds bounds

implementation_order.description: Recommended implementation sequence based on priority, dependency, and risk

phases.name: Critical Security (P0)
phases.rationale: Quick wins that eliminate critical vulnerabilities with minimal risk

phases.name: Performance Critical (P0)
phases.rationale: OOM fix requires careful SQL query design and testing

phases.name: Rate Limiting & SSRF (P1)
phases.rationale: New middleware and utility — no breaking changes

phases.name: Business Logic & Auth (P1)
phases.rationale: Requires schema migration for auto-reply opt-in. Static files need URL migration plan.

phases.name: Bug Fixes & Cleanup (P2)
phases.rationale: Lower priority, can be done after critical fixes are deployed

testing_checklist.test: Start app without JWT_SECRET in production mode — should throw error. Start in development — should generate random secret and log warning.
Seed 100K+ messages for a tenant, then call GET /conversations — should respond in <2s without OOM.
Generate 1000 tokens, verify no collisions and statistical randomness (chi-squared test).
Send 101 requests with rate_limit=100 API key — 101st should return 429. Verify X-RateLimit-Remaining decrements.
Send media with url=http://169.254.169.254/ — should return 400 'URLs pointing to private/internal IP addresses are not allowed'.
Set auto_reply_enabled=false, send webhook with response body — should NOT auto-reply. Set true — should auto-reply.
Set org subscription_status='EXPIRED', make API call — should return 403.
Monitor DB connections — should not see extra connection pool from daily-reset worker.
Create webhook, let it fail 5 times — status should be FAILED after attempt 5, not attempt 3.
Restart app, verify daily reset BullMQ job is scheduled. Check bull-board dashboard.
Set daily_message_count to max, call sendLocationMessage — should return error 'Daily limit reached'.
Call GET /messages?limit=999999 — should cap at 100. Call with page=-1 — should default to 1.

what_is_already_good: Prisma schema design — solid indexes, UUIDs, enums, proper relations
Webhook delivery via BullMQ with exponential backoff
Anti-ban warming phases (DAY_1_3 → DAY_4_7 → DAY_8_14 → NORMAL)
API key permission system — granular 9-permission model
Multi-tenant isolation via organization_id in most queries
Session management with multi-file auth state for Baileys
Consistent error handler covering Fastify, Zod, JWT, and custom errors
WebSocket real-time updates for QR code and status
Message type handling covers 20+ WhatsApp message types
